name: devconsole-toolkit
description: A powerful open-source suite of utilities for extracting, mapping, debugging, inspection, monitoring, and rapid exploration inside the browser console.

scripts.test: node -c dct.js && node -c src/User-Input/Universal-User-.js && node -c src/User-Input/NextRay.js && node -c src/Parameter/Universal-Parameter-Extractor-Client-Side.js && node -c src/Network/Nerwork-Mapper.js && node -c src/Network/NextRay-DevTools-V2.js && node -c src/Sensitive-Disclousure/Gold-Digger.js && node -c src/Sensitive-Disclousure/Hidden-Gold.js && node -c src/Interactive-Mapping/Interactive-Web-Analysis.js && node -c src/Error-debug-handling/Error-handling-debugger.js && echo 'All syntax checks passed'

author: ArkhAngelLifeJiggy
